---
page-layout: custom
css:
  - styles/homepage.css
listing:
  - id: blogs
    contents: listings/data/blogs.yml
    template: listings/_list.ejs
  - id: music
    contents: listings/data/music.yml
    template: listings/_list.ejs
  - id: landmarks
    contents: listings/data/landmarks.yml
    template: listings/_list.ejs
  - id: stishki
    contents: listings/data/stishki.yml
    template: listings/_list.ejs
  - id: stuff
    contents: listings/data/stuff.yml
    template: listings/_list.ejs
---

{{< include _includes/_layout_start.qmd >}}

::: {.rt-listings}

```{=html}
<details class="rt-listing-section">
<summary>blogs</summary>
```
::: {#blogs}
:::
```{=html}
</details>

<details class="rt-listing-section">
<summary>top x</summary>
```
::: {#music}
:::
```{=html}
</details>

<details class="rt-listing-section">
<summary>landmarks</summary>
```
::: {#landmarks}
:::
```{=html}
</details>

<details class="rt-listing-section">
<summary>stishki</summary>
```
::: {#stishki}
:::
```{=html}
</details>

<details class="rt-listing-section">
<summary>stuff</summary>
```
::: {#stuff}
:::
```{=html}
</details>
```

:::

{{< include _includes/_layout_end.qmd >}}
